data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. ROSE RUN ARI drew a wide gate last start and was never a genuine threat, beaten 30 metres into sixth at Miami Valley Raceway over 1609m. Ideally placed and is sure to play a major role. 3. PLUCKY PAMMY T has a strong record here so must be a chance on the back of a good win over 1609m at this track last time. 6. TANKFULLALUCK is in the mix at her first run since scoring over 1609m at this track five months ago.","runners":[5,3,6],"exclusive":false}
